channel.title: Azure Logic Apps on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Logic Apps on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Logic Apps Automation SKU for agentic business process automation.
item.description:
Azure Logic Apps Automation SKU is in public preview. It is positioned for building agentic business process automation by combining workflows, APIs, and AI agents in one service.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Logic Apps Codeful Workflows with Logic Apps Standard SDK.
item.description:
Azure Logic Apps Standard SDK now has a public preview for codeful workflows, letting teams define workflows in code while using managed orchestration and enterprise connectors. The update targets integration and automation scenarios that want code-based development with cloud-scale operations.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Logic Apps now enables developers to invoke Microsoft Foundry Agents directly from workflows.
item.description:
Azure Logic Apps public preview now lets developers invoke Microsoft Foundry Agents directly from workflows. The update is intended to reduce the gap between agent development in Azure AI Foundry and process automation in Logic Apps.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Knowledge as a Service with Azure Logic Apps.
item.description:
Azure Logic Apps is introducing a public preview aimed at simplifying RAG by providing “Knowledge as a Service.” The update says teams can avoid building and operating the full ingestion, chunking, embeddings, vector store, and retrieval stack themselves.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Logic Apps MCP Server.
item.description:
Azure Logic Apps MCP Server is now generally available, aimed at making existing workflows callable by AI agents and MCP-based tooling without building custom API layers. The update focuses on reducing integration plumbing and operational complexity.

  • Source: Azure Updates
